meta.note: Quotes, news, earnings & analyst trends are live (Finnhub). Technicals are derived from live price/returns; options chains, IV and flow are modeled (no free options data).

news.summary: Wall Street ends choppy session lower as tech shares drop  Reuters

news.headline: Defense startups raid auto and fracking sectors for parts to speed weapons output - Reuters
news.summary: Defense startups raid auto and fracking sectors for parts to speed weapons output  Reuters

news.headline: World Cup could boost the June jobs report by 40,000, Goldman estimates
news.summary: Nonfarm payrolls are projected to post a gain of 115,000, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

news.headline: Chip stocks that notched record rallies in second quarter start Q3 with a dud
news.summary: Memory maker Micron, which jumped over 240% in the second quarter, dropped 11% on Wednesday, wiping out nearly $200 billion of market capitalization.

news.headline: US factory activity eases off four-year high; input prices remain elevated - Reuters
news.summary: US factory activity eases off four-year high; input prices remain elevated  Reuters

news.headline: Why Interactive Brokers Group Stockholders Won big on Wednesday
news.summary: Their company did very well in June.

news.headline: Prominent Tech Analyst Dan Ives Is Leaving Wedbush
news.summary: During his eight years at Wedbush, Dan Ives became one of the most familiar faces on Wall Street and took a consistently bullish view on tech.

news.headline: Apple Maps Out 2027 Product Push — New iPad Pro, Redesigned Entry-Level MacBook Pro Reportedly In Pipeline
news.summary: Apple is reportedly lining up a number of hardware upgrades and next-gen chips as it prepares for one of its busiest product cycles in years.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $725.17 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $745.76 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Neutral — watch only — wait for confirmation.
Signals are conflicted — let the first 30 minutes set the tone before committing risk.
Use QQQ $725.17 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: META CALL — enter $25.67–$28.37, target $40.53+, stop $16.21.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed lower with SPY -0.14% and QQQ -1.52%. Composite sentiment -10 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, market breadth (a/d), sector rotation. VIX at 15.54 (+1.08%). Environment read: watch only — wait for confirmation. Leadership came from Financials; Healthcare lagged. Today's standouts: COIN +8.93%, META +8.81%. Laggards: AMD -6.89%, AVGO -2.23%. Carrying META as the top idea into tomorrow (6.4/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
